# https://www.robotstxt.org/robotstxt.html
# Robots.txt for whoza.ai

# Block AI training bots (but allow search indexing)
User-agent: Amazonbot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: meta-externalagent
Disallow: /

# Allow all other bots with specific restrictions
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow admin and protected routes
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /portal
Disallow: /tasks
Disallow: /reports
Disallow: /checkout

# Disallow API endpoints
Disallow: /api/

# Explicitly allow important pages (for clarity)
Allow: /blog
Allow: /blog/*
Allow: /how-it-works
Allow: /pricing
Allow: /trust
Allow: /case-studies
Allow: /free-score
Allow: /privacy
Allow: /terms
Allow: /contact

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://whoza.ai/sitemap.xml
